text:
Created attachment 159550
svn diff

There's a new release, 0.10.3 (https://github.com/wackou/guessit/releases/tag/0.10.3), which I needed for the new multimedia/py-subliminal version.

Please see attached svn diff

I didn't change any comments, maintaner, etc in the makefile, as i don't know what the proper format/etiquette is.

It builds, install and runs fine on my FreeBSD 10.2-PRERELEASE #0 r285847 amd64 with the latest ports tree.
